meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Basic App Limits
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade SaaS applications at record speed.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps that fail to impress. By integrating Antigravity for rapid UI prototyping and Claude Code for iterative logic development, you can transform simple concepts into high-converting, production-ready SaaS products. This workflow slashes development time by 70%, allowing you to ship faster and command higher freelance rates.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: staring at a generic dashboard, watching the progress bar crawl while your client’s deadline looms. You’re stuck in the 'basic app' trap—churning out boilerplates that lack the polish, performance, and professional edge required to justify a premium invoice. The market doesn't pay for code; it pays for solved problems and seamless experiences.

It is time to stop coding like it's 2015. By leveraging AI-native workflows, you can bypass the tedious manual labor of scaffolding and focus purely on architectural strategy and user delight. This isn't just about moving faster—it’s about moving smarter and building apps that actually scale.

steps.title: Define the Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use Antigravity to structure your database schema and API endpoints. This prevents technical debt before it starts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust, scalable schema for a SaaS platform including user authentication, subscription tiers, and a project management dashboard. Use Prisma ORM syntax.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.prisma --task 'Initialize database schema and migrations'

steps.title: Bootstrap the UI Component Library
steps.description: Skip the layout headaches. Use AI to generate a modular component library that matches your client's brand identity perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a set of reusable Tailwind CSS components for a high-converting SaaS dashboard, focusing on dark-mode compatibility and accessibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --components 'navbar, sidebar, data-table, pricing-card' --style tailwind

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Business Logic
steps.description: Translate complex business requirements into clean, testable code using Claude Code's context-aware refactoring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function to handle Stripe subscription webhooks and update user status in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement webhook handler for Stripe events in /api/webhooks/route.ts'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use AI to scan for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks, ensuring your app is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the current codebase, specifically looking for SQL injection points and insecure API routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test --security-audit 'Identify and fix vulnerabilities in current codebase'

steps.title: Deployment and CI/CD Automation
steps.description: Configure an automated deployment pipeline so you can ship updates with a single command.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow file for automated deployment to Vercel, including build tests and linting.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Context File' that summarizes your client's specific business goals to keep Claude Code aligned with the project vision.
Use Antigravity to generate 'mock data' early, allowing you to test UI states before the backend is fully functional.
When Claude Code gets stuck, ask it to 'explain its reasoning'—it often reveals a flawed assumption you can correct instantly.
Treat your prompts like documentation; store your best Antigravity templates in a private repo to reuse across multiple client projects.
Run periodic 'Self-Refactor' prompts to clean up unnecessary boilerplate code generated during the rapid prototyping phase.
content.next_steps: Refine your workflow by integrating a specialized CI/CD tool, then start identifying high-ticket clients who value speed and custom SaaS solutions.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic. Elevate your freelance career by mastering the AI-driven development stack that separates the amateurs from the pros. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
